condition: +3% or more rise: do not chase / -5% or more fall: confirm reason
reason: Avoid buying short-term spikes and catch material bad news early.
If the selected stock loses to TOPIX sharply, the selection edge may be weakening.

condition: yen appreciation of 2 yen or more in one day
reason: FX can quickly change profit expectations for overseas-sensitive stocks.

action: stop add for high PER/growth names
reason: A sharp yield rise often compresses high valuation stocks.
Avoid concentration in one theme even when the theme looks strong.

condition: downward revision, order weakness, margin deterioration
reason: The core reason for holding is company earnings, not price movement alone.
A candidate must keep positive expected value versus benchmark.

metric_to_enter: TOB, regulation, accident, policy, new product, supply shock
condition: bad news confirmed / good news unconfirmed
action: bad: stop, good: verify before add
reason: Qualitative information is used only after source and price reaction are checked.
